Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2009 0 0}Yo, long time no see. What's up? Did you have an upset stomach or something?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}Anyways, I got something to tell ya![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 2 -1 0 0}Oh, wait! I'm not supposed to spill![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}Sorry, man. Forget you heard anything. Hahahaha.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}Sheesh, someone's full of energy today... I could hear you from all the way over there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2098 0 0}Huh? You two didn't come to school together even though you're in the same dorm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1142 0 0}Ugh, I've heard enough about that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}Anyway... {f 4 1}-kun. Are you feeling better?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}Sorry to hit you with this so soon after you've recovered...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}But the chairman wants to talk to you today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}Head to the dorm after school and come up to the fourth floor. Don't forget, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2072 0 0}Hey, you totally thought I was a pain in the ass just now, didn't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 2 -1 0 0}Er, my bad. I'm not the same person as I was yesterday. Just forget all about the ol' Junpei...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}Anyways, sorry for always making everything about me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}You should cheer up, too. After all, you got a friend in me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}Sheesh, someone's full of energy today... I could hear you from all the way over there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2098 0 0}Huh? You two didn't come to school together even though you're in the same dorm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1142 0 0}Ugh, I've heard enough about that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}Anyway... {f 4 1}-kun. Are you feeling better?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}Sorry to hit you with this so soon after you've recovered...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}But the chairman wants to talk to you today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}Head to the dorm after school and come up to the fourth floor. Don't forget, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2101 0 0}Hold up... Why are you being called out by the chairman? What the heck did you do!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1034 0 0}It's nothing serious. C'mon, we're gonna be late if we just stand around here talking.[n]{f 1 1}
